_comment_Peruri.BackendStg: Peruri backend staging URL for user authentication (POST api/users/login)
_comment_Peruri.Stampv2Stg: Peruri stamp v2 staging URL for e-meterai allotment (POST chanel/stampv2)
_comment_Peruri.InventoryStg: Peruri inventory staging URL for inventory management
_comment_Peruri.User: Peruri service account username for authentication
_comment_Peruri.Password: Peruri service account password for authentication
_comment_Peruri.KeyStamp: KeyStamp Docker adapter URL for on-premise PDF signing (POST adapter/pdfsigning/rest/docSigningZ)
_comment_Peruri.SharedFolder: Shared folder path for Docker volume (used for PDF exchange between API and signing adapter)
_comment_Peruri.TokenExpiryBufferMinutes: Token expiry buffer in minutes (tokens will be refreshed this many minutes before actual expiry)

_comment_Usage.OnPremise: When configured, the stamping endpoint will use on-premise flow: PDF -> shared folder -> Peruri API -> Docker adapter -> signed PDF
_comment_Usage.Fallback: If Peruri options are not configured, the system falls back to cloud-based Peruri PDS service
